resources: Media3 Video Player Play Video Stream or play local video files Trim Video Cut and trim video to desired length Compress Video Reduce file size while keeping quality Choose an action to get started cardScale Start to trim your video Tap to play Preview (tap video to play/pause): Or choose from all built-in videos: Import local video Choose video for trim Choose compress video Back All built-in videos from videos.kt are still working. Please select a video first Trim Video Playback Error Something went wrong Very fast but no compression Trims by cutting at the nearest keyframe. Very fast, original quality." Slow but compresses well Re-encodes and compresses the video. Slower but smaller file size." Trim Close Please select an option. Tap option 1 for technical details. Video Information
